cards.title: Import substitution
cards.body: Works with any endoscope. Local inference. No internet.

slides.heading: TEAM
slides.title: VitaMind — three people, three areas of expertise

members.name: Irina Mazurova
members.role: Clinical methodologist · Clinical expertise, scenario validation

members.name: Evgeny Moskovsky
members.role: Head of laboratory · Scientific validity of the model

slides.heading: HOW IT WORKS
slides.title: Connect in 30 seconds — works with any endoscope

benefits.title: Universality
benefits.desc: Connects to any endoscope with video output. No vendor lock-in.

benefits.title: Local processing
benefits.desc: All inference works offline. Patient data never leaves the room.

benefits.title: Risk reduction
benefits.desc: Meta-analysis of 15,000+ colonoscopies: 26% adenomas, 27% serrated, 34% flat adenomas are missed.

slides.heading: LIMITATIONS
slides.title: What you need to know
slides.note: False positives are adjustable via confidence threshold. Needs initial calibration. Scopiq is a second opinion — final decision is always the endoscopist's.

segments.title: Simulator
segments.desc: Training residents on real videos with AI annotations

slides.heading: COMPETITION
slides.title: Scopiq vs ArtInCol vs Foreign solutions

rows.competitor: GI Genius, CAD EYE left Russia

slides.source: 88% of Russian endoscopy market — imported devices (Olympus, Fujifilm, Pentax, Karl Storz)
